payload.reason: Victor updated Builder Console task status with grounded evidence and governance approval.

request.taskTitle: Rewire memory, tier, and graph structures onto UOR identity
request.query: What should happen next with the governed automation task "Rewire memory, tier, and graph structures onto UOR identity" in phase "UOR Content-Addressed Identity Migration"?

groundedContext.query: What should happen next with the governed automation task "Rewire memory, tier, and graph structures onto UOR identity" in phase "UOR Content-Addressed Identity Migration"?
semanticNodeLabels: Rewire memory, tier, and graph structures onto UOR identity
Core memory and tier structures key on UOR identity.
Replace ad hoc Victor memory identity with deterministic UOR addressing so memory writes, lookups, deduplication, and supersession lineage are cryptographically and semantically stable.
Introduce canonical UOR address type and BLAKE3 content addressing
Run governed migration from current provenance to UOR-backed identity
Content-addressed identity uses the designated BLAKE3 pipeline.
recommendedNextActions: Implement core memory and tier structures key on UOR identity

before.title: Rewire memory, tier, and graph structures onto UOR identity
before.description: Apply UOR identity across documents, chunks, semantic nodes, edges, tier maps, and processor snapshots so the memory stack uses one stable identity model instead of parallel keys.
acceptance: Core memory and tier structures key on UOR identity.
Graph and snapshot layers preserve referential integrity under the new address model.
Identity collisions fail closed instead of silently overwriting artifacts.
